testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Domain list resolved from repository &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/config/can-register-config.feature:14&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe repository contains &amp#27;[1mblocked&amp#27;[22m domains &amp#27;[1m"spam.com,junk.org"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.config.CanRegisterConfigSteps.theRepositoryContainsDomains(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration configuration is resolved&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.config.CanRegisterConfigSteps.registrationConfigurationIsResolved()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1mblocked&amp#27;[22m domains are &amp#27;[1m"spam.com,junk.org"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.config.CanRegisterConfigSteps.domainsAre(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Example #1.2
